title: Unblock Python Behave runner (transition_labels workflow 'epic')
description: Fix the Python test initialization hook so Behave runs without configuration errors.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added missing epic transition_labels to Python default configuration to fix Behave before_all hook error. Dry-run behave now completes without the transition_labels missing workflow 'epic' error.
